purpose: FSI-compliant Terraform Infrastructure workspace — cloned from baseline template `armdiazg/sre-infra-baseline`. Add one .tf file per resource to the agent drop zones.

Terraform/Environments/Infrastructure/us.description: Drop one .tf file per service/VM here. Each file calls the TrackerCore module with workspace-inherited symbols.
Production compute resources. CanNotDelete lock enforced.

Terraform/Environments/Network/us_nonpro.description: VNet + Subnets baseline. CIDRs controlled by var.address_space and var.subnet_prefix. Outputs vnet_id and default_subnet_id.

Terraform/Modules/TrackerCore.description: Core VM module (NIC + Linux VM). Mirrors TR TrackerCore pattern. Source from Infrastructure workspace: ../../../Modules/TrackerCore

workspace_symbols.var.application_name: short app identifier — set this per project
workspace_symbols.local.mandatory_tags: 8 FSI-required tags: Environment, Owner, CostCenter, Application, ManagedBy, Compliance, DataClass, ProvisionedBy
workspace_symbols.module.baseline_rg.name: the resource group to deploy resources into

tagging_policy: All resources must use local.mandatory_tags. Never hardcode tags.
agent_instructions: To provision a new VM: generate ONE .tf file named {resource_name}.tf in Terraform/Environments/Infrastructure/us_nonprod/ (or us_prod for prod). The file contains ONE module call: module "{resource_name_slug}_core" { source = \"../../../Modules/TrackerCore\" ... }. Do NOT add terraform{}/provider{} blocks — the workspace already provides these. Set subnet_id to the default_subnet_id output from Network/us_nonprod (run terraform output in that workspace to get the value, or read it from remote state). Reference var.location, local.mandatory_tags, module.baseline_rg.name from workspace symbols. Set admin_ssh_public_key = var.admin_ssh_public_key (injected by CI via TF_VAR_admin_ssh_public_key).
